title: ImportSummary
description: Aggregated counts of import operations grouped by processing state.

states.description: Map of import operation state names to their counts.

Accepted.description: Number of operations accepted and queued for processing.

ValidationFailed.description: Number of operations that failed schema or data validation.

Unresolved.description: Number of operations waiting for referenced resources to be created.

WaitForMasterVariant.description: Number of variant operations waiting for the master variant.

Rejected.description: Number of operations permanently rejected after retry exhaustion.

Cancelled.description: Number of operations cancelled before processing.

total.description: Total number of import operations in the container.
